refactor_plan.description: Only actor:System can write User.is_pro. Route PUT /api/users/:id/profile allows any actor to set is_pro.
refactor_plan.fix_hint: Add a system-actor check before processing is_pro updates.

refactor_plan.description: Pro feature gate not implemented. No route checks entity.is_pro before granting access to premium features.
refactor_plan.fix_hint: Add middleware that checks user.is_pro == true before pro-only route handlers.

refactor_plan.description: User.is_pro and User.stripe_status fields added to database migration.
